use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in hero sections and forms
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Secondary navigation and feature exploration buttons
Ghost-style inline buttons for minimal UI patterns
Icon buttons for compact toolbars and action bars
ai_summary: A versatile Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant handling, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Features focus-visible ring states, disabled states, and smooth transitions. Designed as an atomic, reusable UI primitive suitable for any industry requiring interactive button controls in SaaS, fintech, e-commerce, or general web applications.
